# ExplainSession

> Tracks flusk explain command runs — AI-powered cost optimization insights

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| query | string | yes | - | User's question or topic |
| status | running \| completed \| failed | yes | running | Session status |
| model | string | yes | - | LLM model used for explanation |
| responseText | string | yes | - | Generated explanation |
| callsAnalyzed | integer | yes | 0 | Number of calls analyzed for context |
| costOfExplain | float | yes | 0 | Cost of running the explain query itself |
| durationMs | integer | yes | - | How long the explain took |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |
